zh.lifeSummary: 當Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I於大約1070年出生在羅曼 艾皮爾時，他的父親Ludvig Walprechtum Walprechtum VON GLEICHEN TONNA26歲，母親Frau Von Helenenburg26歲。他於大約1096年與Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1151年12月29日享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I于大约1070年出生在羅曼 艾皮爾时，他的父亲Ludvig Walprechtum Walprechtum VON GLEICHEN TONNA26岁，母亲Frau Von Helenenburg26岁。他于大约1096年与Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1151年12月29日享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gleichen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: occupational name for an iron worker who flattened out the metal into sheets, from an agent derivative of Middle High German gelīchen ‘to smooth or even out’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the inflected form of German gleich ‘same’, one of names from vocabulary words that were selected at random by government officials when surnames were made compulsory.

nameMeanings.name: Tonna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Erwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Irwin
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from the medieval given name Irwyn, Erwyn, or Everwyn, from Old English eofor ‘boar’ + wine ‘friend’. There has also been some confusion with Irving .

en.lifeSummary: When Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I was born about 1070, in Roman Empire, his father, Ludvig Walprechtum Walprechtum VON GLEICHEN TONNA, was 26 and his mother, Frau Von Helenenburg, was 26. He married Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra about 1096. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 December 1151, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I est né environ 1070, à Roman Empire, son père, Ludvig Walprechtum Walprechtum VON GLEICHEN TONNA, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Frau Von Helenenburg, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra environ 1096. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 décembre 1151, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I um 1070 in Roman Empire geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ludvig Walprechtum Walprechtum VON GLEICHEN TONNA 26 und seine Mutter Frau Von Helenenburg 26. Er hat um 1096 Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Dezember 1151 im Alter von 82 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I è nato il circa 1070 nel Roman Empire, il suo padre, Ludvig Walprechtum Walprechtum VON GLEICHEN TONNA, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Frau Von Helenenburg, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra circa 1096. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 dicembre 1151, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Erwin von Gleichen Tonna Iが約1070年にロマン エンパアーで生まれた時，父Ludvig Walprechtum Walprechtum VON GLEICHEN TONNAは26歳，母Frau Von Helenenburgは26歳であった。約1096年にGrafin Helenburg von Lohbraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1151年12月29日に82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I(이)가 대략 1070년 로먼 피르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ludvig Walprechtum Walprechtum VON GLEICHEN TONNA(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Frau Von Helenenburg(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1096년 Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1151년 12월 29일 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra aproximadamente 1096. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de dezembro de 1151, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I родился около 1070 г. в местности роман эмпир, его отцу по имени Ludvig Walprechtum Walprechtum VON GLEICHEN TONNA было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Frau Von Helenenburg, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra около 1096 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 декабря 1151 г. в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Erwin von Gleichen Tonna I nació aproximadamente 1070, en Roman Empire, su papá, Ludvig Walprechtum Walprechtum VON GLEICHEN TONNA, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Frau Von Helenenburg, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Grafin Helenburg von Lohbra aproximadamente 1096. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de diciembre de 1151, a la edad de 82 años.
